sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْأَخْبَارَ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ عَبْرَ الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِخْبَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju dnevne vijesti putem informativnih stranica.
sentences.translationEn: People read daily news via news websites.

sentences.arabic: تَنْتَشِرُ الْمَعْلُومَاتُ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي كُلِّ أَنْحَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Informacije se šire veoma brzo u svim dijelovima svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Information spreads very quickly in all parts of the world.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ صِحَّةِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ali moramo provjeriti tačnost vijesti prije nego što je objavimo.
sentences.translationEn: But we must verify the accuracy of the news before publishing it.
